items.title: Convex bowl vs non-convex landscape
items.mermaid:
flowchart LR
  convexRoot["Convex f(x)"] --> c1["single global minimum"]
  convexRoot --> c2["any local min = global min"]
  nonconvexRoot["Non-convex f(x)"] --> n1["multiple local minima"]
  nonconvexRoot --> n2["saddle points possible"]
  nonconvexRoot --> n3["init + step size matter"]
items.caption: Convex objectives have one bowl; non-convex objectives can trap or mislead gradient-based search.

items.title: Hessian classification at a critical point
items.mermaid:
flowchart TD
  start["gradient f(x*) = 0"] --> hess["inspect Hessian H at x*"]
  hess --> pd["all eigenvalues > 0"]
  hess --> nd["all eigenvalues < 0"]
  hess --> mix["mixed signs"]
  pd --> lmin["local minimum"]
  nd --> lmax["local maximum"]
  mix --> saddle["saddle point"]
items.caption: Second-order test at a critical point: positive definite Hessian implies a local minimum in smooth unconstrained settings; indefinite implies a saddle.
